months.

I mean, I like, it looks like it's been an exciting year.

Oh,
yeah, it's great.
It's great.

lot Michelle.

it's like all the year end, all the year end meetings, investor reporting, all that stuff.

I pretty much put everything else I do on hold.

So, so
outside of, outside of work, how have you been?
I'm busy but good.

Oh, no.

They were not.
So now I have, I have a toilet that is off.

I mean, it's back on the hole but like it's off and I have to, I have to redo the entire wax ring and stuff, which is a big, big project, but I'm not going to because now I have to just call a plumber to have them come and root out my pipes to get this, this mystery thing of KT has now lodged somewhere in my house in a toilet pipe.
Oh, no.
So that's how my day is going.
Uh So this is, this is an abs what the real reason I'm telling you this is because this meeting, absolute highlight of my day thus far.

I'd say that it's probably one of the most used things.

It's great.
We use it.
